mapper.select: SELECT room_id FROM chat_rooms WHERE room_id = #{roomId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT room_notice_id FROM chat_room_notices WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND room_notice_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY room_notice_id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_room_notices ( room_id, requester_id, room_notice_action, room_notice_type, source_message_id, room_notice_contents, room_notice_status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{requesterUserId}, 'CREATE', #{roomNoticeType}, #{sourceMessageId}, #{roomNoticeContents}, 'ACTIVE', NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE chat_room_notices SET room_notice_action = 'UPDATE',
room_notice_type = #{roomNoticeType},
source_message_id = #{sourceMessageId},
room_notice_contents = #{roomNoticeContents}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND room_notice_id = #{targetRoomNoticeId} AND requester_id = #{requesterUserId} AND room_notice_status != 'DELETED'

UPDATE chat_room_notices SET room_notice_action = 'INACTIVATE', room_notice_status = 'INACTIVE', inactivated_at = NOW() WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND requester_id = #{requesterUserId} AND room_notice_status = 'ACTIVE'

UPDATE chat_room_notices SET room_notice_action = 'INACTIVATE', room_notice_status = 'INACTIVE', inactivated_at = NOW() WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND room_notice_id = #{roomNoticeId} AND room_notice_status = 'ACTIVE'

UPDATE chat_room_notices SET room_notice_action = 'REACTIVATE', room_notice_status = 'ACTIVE', reactivated_at = NOW() WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND room_notice_id = #{roomNoticeId} AND room_notice_status = 'INACTIVE'

UPDATE chat_room_notices SET room_notice_action = 'DELETE', room_notice_status = 'DELETED', deleted_at = NOW() WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND room_notice_id = #{roomNoticeId} AND room_notice_status != 'DELETED'
mapper.select: SELECT rn.room_notice_id AS roomNoticeId, rn.room_id AS roomId, rn.room_notice_action AS roomNoticeAction, rn.room_notice_type AS roomNoticeType, rn.room_notice_contents AS roomNoticeContents, rn.room_notice_status AS roomNoticeStatus, u.public_id AS requesterPublicId, CASE rn.room_notice_action WHEN 'CREATE' THEN rn.created_at WHEN 'UPDATE' THEN rn.updated_at WHEN 'INACTIVATE' THEN rn.inactivated_at WHEN 'REACTIVATE' THEN rn.reactivated_at WHEN 'DELETE' THEN rn.deleted_at END AS lastAppliedAt FROM chat_room_notices rn JOIN users u ON u.user_id = rn.requester_id WHERE rn.room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY rn.room_notice_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT rn.room_notice_id AS roomNoticeId, rn.room_id AS roomId, rn.room_notice_action AS roomNoticeAction, rn.room_notice_type AS roomNoticeType, rn.room_notice_contents AS roomNoticeContents, rn.room_notice_status AS roomNoticeStatus, u.public_id AS requesterPublicId, CASE rn.room_notice_action WHEN 'CREATE' THEN rn.created_at WHEN 'UPDATE' THEN rn.updated_at WHEN 'INACTIVATE' THEN rn.inactivated_at WHEN 'REACTIVATE' THEN rn.reactivated_at WHEN 'DELETE' THEN rn.deleted_at END AS lastAppliedAt FROM chat_room_notices rn JOIN users u ON u.user_id = rn.requester_id WHERE rn.room_id = #{roomId} AND rn.room_notice_id = #{roomNoticeId}

SELECT cr.room_id AS roomId, cr.room_type AS roomType, requester_rm.custom_room_name AS customRoomName, requester_rm.custom_room_thumbnail AS customRoomThumbnail, requester_rm.custom_room_back_ground AS customRoomBackground, requester_rm.message_notification_enabled AS messageNotificationEnabled, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room_members cnt_rm WHERE cnt_rm.room_id = cr.room_id AND cnt_rm.member_status = 'ACTIVE' ) AS roomMemberCount FROM chat_rooms cr JOIN room_members requester_rm ON requester_rm.room_id = cr.room_id AND requester_rm.user_id = #{requesterUserId} JOIN room_members friend_rm ON friend_rm.room_id = cr.room_id AND friend_rm.user_id != requester_rm.user_id JOIN users friend_user ON friend_user.user_id = friend_rm.user_id AND friend_user.public_id = #{friendPublicId} WHERE cr.room_type = 'DIRECT' AND cr.room_status = 'ACTIVE' AND requester_rm.member_status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1

SELECT cr.room_id AS roomId, cr.room_type AS roomType, rm.custom_room_name AS customRoomName, rm.custom_room_thumbnail AS customRoomThumbnail, rm.custom_room_back_ground AS customRoomBackground, rm.message_notification_enabled AS messageNotificationEnabled, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room_members cnt_rm WHERE cnt_rm.room_id = cr.room_id AND cnt_rm.member_status = 'ACTIVE' ) AS roomMemberCount FROM chat_rooms cr JOIN room_members rm ON rm.room_id = cr.room_id WHERE cr.room_id = #{roomId} AND cr.room_status = 'ACTIVE' AND rm.user_id = #{requesterUserId} AND rm.member_status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT u.public_id AS publicId, u.nickname AS nickname, u.friend_code AS friendCode, u.profile_img AS profileImg, rm.role AS role FROM room_members rm JOIN users u ON u.user_id = rm.user_id WHERE rm.room_id = #{roomId} AND rm.member_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY CASE rm.role WHEN 'HOST' THEN 1 WHEN 'MANAGER' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, rm.room_member_id ASC

SELECT rn.room_notice_id AS roomNoticeId, rn.room_id AS roomId, rn.room_notice_action AS roomNoticeAction, rn.room_notice_type AS roomNoticeType, rn.room_notice_contents AS roomNoticeContents, rn.room_notice_status AS roomNoticeStatus, u.public_id AS requesterPublicId, CASE rn.room_notice_action WHEN 'CREATE' THEN rn.created_at WHEN 'UPDATE' THEN rn.updated_at WHEN 'INACTIVATE' THEN rn.inactivated_at WHEN 'REACTIVATE' THEN rn.reactivated_at WHEN 'DELETE' THEN rn.deleted_at END AS lastAppliedAt FROM chat_room_notices rn JOIN users u ON u.user_id = rn.requester_id WHERE rn.room_id = #{roomId} AND rn.room_notice_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY rn.room_notice_id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE room_members SET member_status = 'LEFT', role = IF(role = 'HOST', 'HOST', role), left_at = NOW() WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND user_id = #{requesterUserId} AND member_status = 'ACTIVE'

UPDATE room_members rm JOIN users u ON u.user_id = rm.user_id SET rm.role = 'NONE', rm.member_status = 'KICKED', rm.kicked_at = NOW() WHERE rm.room_id = #{roomId} AND u.public_id = #{targetPublicId} AND rm.user_id != #{requesterUserId} AND rm.member_status = 'ACTIVE' AND rm.role != 'HOST'

UPDATE room_members rm JOIN users u ON u.user_id = rm.user_id SET rm.role = 'NONE', rm.member_status = 'BANNED', rm.banned_at = NOW() WHERE rm.room_id = #{roomId} AND u.public_id = #{targetPublicId} AND rm.user_id != #{requesterUserId} AND rm.member_status = 'ACTIVE' AND rm.role != 'HOST'
